## orch-go servers up

Start servers for a project

### Synopsis

Start all configured servers for a project using launchd or Docker.

```
orch-go servers up [project] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for up
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --server string   OpenCode server URL (default "http://localhost:4096")
```
